title: Subtraction
description: focus on developing subtraction fluency within 20, emphasizing conceptual understanding through models, drawings, and equations

prompts.input: How can you use objects or drawings to show the subtraction problem 10 - 4? Explain your thinking.
hints: Think about how many objects you would start with and how many you would take away.
How can you represent the remaining objects or the answer with your drawing?

prompts.input: Imagine you have 12 apples, and you give away 5. How can you represent this subtraction problem using a drawing or model? Describe what your drawing shows and how you found the answer.
hints: Think about how you can group the apples to show what you started with and what you gave away.
You might want to label your drawing to explain each part of the subtraction process.

subject: Math
